prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约7186→7784→11747→7763→7935名。2023年出现异常跳升（约11747名），2024年迅速回落到7763名，2025年小幅后移至7935名，近两年基本在7700–8000名区间波动，2025年基准位次约7935名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划：2021–2023年均为88人，2024年增至89人，2025年增至92人，2026年计划91人，较2025年小幅缩招1人（-1.09%），缩招幅度极小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京科技大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第33名、2022年第36名、2023–2026年稳定在第35名，属于全国顶尖211行列，排名持续稳定；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及国家卫健委通报的伪造成绩单和抄袭学位论文事件，可能对报考心理产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度总排名第1（高热），综合热度超1400万，学校在短视频平台曝光极高，关注度持续攀升，但偏负面舆情与高热曝光并存；冶金工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、科学技术史A+、环境科学与工程A-，共4个A-及以上学科，材料、冶金等王牌学科与物理类招生专业（材料科学与工程、机械类、自动化类等）高度匹配，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与该校优势工科方向契合；辽宁省2026年普通高考总人数约20万，物理类估算约14.36万人，与2025年基本持平；省控线物理类本科批近年稳定在360–368分区间，2025年为367分，变化不大；北京科技大学位于北京市，对辽宁考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在辽宁招生占比相对稳定，未出现大幅调整。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7935名、2026年小幅缩招1人、声誉偏负面轻微抑制、抖音高热关注度部分抵消、考生总数持平等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次约7903名，较2025年基本持平略后移；区间7403–8403名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 7186 → 7784 → 11747 → 7763 → 7935. In 2023, there was an abnormal jump (about 11747), which quickly fell back to 7763 in 2024, and slightly shifted to 7935 in 2025. In the past two years, it has fluctuated around 7700–8000, with a baseline ranking of about 7935 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning: 88 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 89 in 2024, 92 in 2025, and planned 91 in 2026, a slight reduction of 1 student (-1.09%) compared to 2025, with minimal impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Science and Technology Beijing is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 33rd in 2021, 36th in 2022, and stable at 35th from 2023 to 2026, belonging to the top-tier 211 universities with consistent rankings. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving the National Health Commission's report on forged transcripts and plagiarized thesis incidents, which may mildly suppress application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks first overall (high heat), with comprehensive heat exceeding 14 million. The university has extremely high exposure on short video platforms, with continuously rising attention, but negative public opinion coexists with high heat. It has 4 A- or above disciplines: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, History of Science and Technology A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A-. The flagship disciplines like materials and metallurgy highly match the Physics Category enrollment majors (Materials Science and Engineering, Mechanical Class, Automation Class, etc.), strongly attracting related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Class, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., continue to be highly recommended hot majors, aligning with the university's advantageous engineering directions. In 2026, the total number of Liaoning ordinary college entrance examination takers is about 200,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 143,600, roughly the same as 2025. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch has been stable in the 360–368 score range in recent years, with 367 in 2025, showing little change. University of Science and Technology Beijing is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Liaoning candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Liaoning remains relatively stable, with no major adjustments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7935, a slight reduction of 1 student in 2026, mild suppression from negative reputation, partial offset by high Douyin attention, and stable total number of candidates, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 7903, basically flat with a slight backward shift compared to 2025; range 7403–8403.

- Computer Class (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Internet of Things Engineering)
- Materials Science and Engineering (High-Precision and Advanced Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Nanoscience and Engineering Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Energy Storage Science and Engineering
- Safety Engineering
- Civil Engineering Class (Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7400–8400, it is recommended to mainly fill Tier 2 majors, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If ranking is better than 7400, focus on sprinting for flagship majors like Science Experimental Class and Computer Class; if ranking is around 7900, mainly choose medium-difficulty majors like Automation Class, Communication Engineering, and Engineering Experimental Class; if ranking is close to 8400, it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1276 → 1604 → 1959 → 2014 → 1897. Overall, there is a backward trend, with a year-on-year decline from 2021 to 2024 (from 1276 to 2014), and a slight rebound to 1897 in 2025. In the past three years, it has fluctuated around the 1900–2000 range, with a baseline ranking of about 1897 in 2025. The enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province: 19 students each year from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 18 in 2024, further reduced to 16 in 2025, and planned to be 19 in 2026, an increase of 3 students (+18.75%) compared to 2025. The expansion is significant, and competition is expected to intensify.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; stable at 35th in the Soft Science ranking, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (academic misconduct incidents), but History Category only has 3 majors (Social Science Experimental Class, Foreign Languages and Literature, Business Administration). The negative public opinion has a relatively limited impact on History Category applicants. Douyin popularity ranks first overall, but content is mainly engineering-focused, with limited reference value for History Category students. The university's A+ disciplines (Metallurgical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, History of Science and Technology) are all engineering fields, with no direct correspondence to History Category majors. The Business Administration major corresponds to the Business Administration discipline, which has not been independently rated.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major social popularity is divided and wait-and-see, Business Administration is divided and wait-and-see, Foreign Languages and Literature is generally wait-and-see. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in Liaoning Province is about 56,400, roughly the same as in 2025. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch: 456 points in 2021, 404 points in 2022–2023, 400 points in 2024, and 437 points in 2025, with significant fluctuations in recent years. Beijing is located in a neighboring province to Liaoning, exerting strong regional appeal to Liaoning examinees. The university's enrollment in History Category in Liaoning is small (16–19 students), with a stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 1897 in 2025, an expansion of 3 students in 2026, the total number of History Category examinees remaining stable, and the limited negative impact of reputation, it is estimated that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will be about 2095, slightly backward compared to 2025; the range is 1781–2409.
